title: phyllangium palustre
intro: Phyllangium palustre, also known as marsh tea or marsh cinquefoil, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Phyllangium palustre include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Phyllangium palustre can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
